subject: fix: address 11 bugs found in codebase audit
body:
- ConfirmDialog: stop Escape propagation to prevent double-close with BaseModal
- App: bulk delete now handles selected arcs (not just nodes)
- DetailPanel: Cancel resets form state to original prop values (NodeDetail + ArcDetail)
- useSelection: toggle deselect no longer sets removed item as primary
- tagSuggestionService: terminateEngine resets refCount to prevent stale count
- ImportModal: double-click guard on Smart Matching button
- graphService: move arc queries inside transactions (TOCTOU fix for deleteNode/bulkDeleteNodes)
- viewService: inject modified timestamp on updateView (consistent with updateNode/updateArc)
- ConventionsModal: clear setTimeout on unmount (prevents setState after unmount)
- GraphCanvas: extract cxttap handler for proper removeListener cleanup
- TimelineView: checkbox checked state uses effectiveSelected (not stale selectedProperties)
- ViewConfiguration: add optional modified field for timestamp tracking

Tags: bugfix, audit, cleanup, ui, service, hooks
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-audit
Semver: patch
